allow: Bash(curl -sk "https://api.github.com/search/repositories?q=fugle+marketdata&sort=stars" 2>&1 | python3 -c "import json,sys; repos=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['items'][:3]; [print\(r['full_name'], r['html_url']\) for r in repos]")

Bash(FUGLE_API_KEY="YjFhYzA4ZmMtY2UxZi00ZGM0LWI2N2MtOThmZWViZmRkMzAzIDAwZGMyOTEyLTRkMzAtNGYwNC1iN2I4LTRmZTI2YmFlOTUwMw=="
curl -s "https://api.fugle.tw/marketdata/v1.0/stock/intraday/quote/2330" \\
  -H "X-API-KEY: $FUGLE_API_KEY" | python3 -c "
import json, sys
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\(f'股票: {d[\\"symbol\\"]} {d[\\"name\\"]}'\)
print\(f'現價: {d[\\"lastPrice\\"]}'\)
print\(f'昨收: {d[\\"previousClose\\"]}'\)
chg = d['lastPrice'] - d['previousClose']
chgpct = chg / d['previousClose'] * 100
print\(f'漲跌: {chg:+.0f} \({chgpct:+.2f}%\)'\)
print\(f'高/低: {d[\\"highPrice\\"]} / {d[\\"lowPrice\\"]}'\)
print\(f'成交量: {d[\\"total\\"][\\"tradeVolume\\"]} 張'\)
")

Bash(FUGLE_API_KEY="YjFhYzA4ZmMtY2UxZi00ZGM0LWI2N2MtOThmZWViZmRkMzAzIDAwZGMyOTEyLTRkMzAtNGYwNC1iN2I4LTRmZTI2YmFlOTUwMw=="
curl -s "https://api.fugle.tw/marketdata/v1.0/stock/intraday/quote/2337" \\
  -H "X-API-KEY: $FUGLE_API_KEY" | python3 -c "
import json, sys
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\(f'lastPrice: {d[\\"lastPrice\\"]}'\)
print\(f'tradeVolume: {d[\\"total\\"][\\"tradeVolume\\"]}'\)
print\(f'tradeValue: {d[\\"total\\"][\\"tradeValue\\"]}'\)
# 用成交值 / 成交價 反推股數
shares = d['total']['tradeValue'] / d['lastPrice']
lots = shares / 1000
print\(f'推算: {shares:.0f} 股 = {lots:.0f} 張'\)
print\(f'所以 tradeVolume {d[\\"total\\"][\\"tradeVolume\\"]} 的單位是: {\\"張\\" if abs\(d[\\"total\\"][\\"tradeVolume\\"] - lots\) < lots*0.01 else \\"股\(shares\)\\"}'\)
")
